items.title: HWI (Hardware Wallet Interface)
items.description: Command-line tool and Python library for connecting hardware wallets to Bitcoin Core. Enables direct signing with devices like Trezor, Ledger, and Coldcard without trusting intermediary software.

items.title: Mining Decentralization
items.description: Analysis of mining centralization pressures and decentralization mechanisms: Stratum V2, DATUM, hash marketplaces, small-pool coordination, and the path toward sovereign hash-rate ownership.
